background.paper_texture_notes: Use a subtle CSS radial-gradient to create a dotted notebook paper effect, e.g., radial-gradient(circle, #E5E5E5 1px, transparent 1px) with background-size: 24px 24px.

styles.h2_card_title: text-2xl sm:text-3xl font-caveat text-[#D9534F] transform -rotate-2 inline-block mb-3

layout_system.spacing_philosophy: Generous Spacing Philosophy. Use p-4 to p-6 inside sticky note cards. Gap-6 between cards in the masonry/bento grid.
layout_system.main_grid: grid grid-cols-1 md:grid-cols-2 lg:grid-cols-3 xl:grid-cols-4 gap-6 p-6 items-start auto-rows-min
layout_system.card_style: relative p-5 rounded-sm shadow-[4px_4px_12px_rgba(0,0,0,0.06)] border border-[#E5E7EB]/50 transition-all duration-200 hover:-translate-y-1 hover:shadow-lg
layout_system.card_rotations: Apply subtle random rotations to cards (e.g., -rotate-1, rotate-1, -rotate-2) to emphasize the messy notebook feel.

decorative_elements.washi_tape: absolute w-12 h-5 bg-[#E85D75]/60 -top-2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 rotate-3 backdrop-blur-sm shadow-sm

component_guidelines.forms_and_inputs: Use Shadcn components but override borders to be 1px solid #D1D5DB, rounded-md, with a subtle focus ring. Use transparent backgrounds for inputs inside pastel cards.
component_guidelines.checkboxes: Use Shadcn Checkbox, but style them to look slightly rounded or use custom SVG for a 'drawn checkmark' feel when checked.
component_guidelines.buttons: Primary buttons: bg-[#3A3A3A] text-white font-nunito font-semibold rounded-md px-6 py-2 shadow-sm hover:bg-[#222222] transition-colors.
component_guidelines.calendar_datepicker: Use Shadcn Calendar. Style the active/selected date with a circle background in a pastel color (e.g., #FFD1DC) and handwriting font for the selected date.
component_guidelines.icons: Use 'lucide-react' with strokeWidth={1.5} for a lighter, drawn feel. Alternatively, install 'phosphor-icons' for duotone styles if needed.

page_specific_instructions.auth_pages: Login/Signup should look like the cover of a journal or a clean desk surface with a notepad in the center. Use the paper dot-grid background.
page_specific_instructions.dashboard_header: Header should contain the Brand Logo (font-caveat, text-4xl), an interactive DatePicker (calendar), and User Profile/Logout. Use glassmorphism or simple off-white solid bg with a hand-drawn bottom border (e.g., border-b-2 border-dashed border-[#D1D5DB]).

planner_cards_mapping.name: Life Balance
planner_cards_mapping.features: 2x2 grid containing Health, Family, Fun, Spiritual.

planner_cards_mapping.name: Daily Schedules
planner_cards_mapping.features: Tall card, scrolling list from 6 AM to 11 PM with time and input field.

planner_cards_mapping.name: Expense Tracker
planner_cards_mapping.features: List of Item + Amount, and a Total line.

animations_and_interactions.hover: Cards should have a slight lift (hover:-translate-y-1) and increased shadow. Buttons should scale slightly (hover:scale-[1.02]).
animations_and_interactions.focus: Inputs inside cards should have a subtle bottom border highlight rather than a full box ring to mimic writing on a line.
animations_and_interactions.page_load: Cards should stagger in using framer-motion (fade in and slide up slightly).

accessibility_and_testing.contrast: Ensure text colors against pastel backgrounds meet at least AA contrast ratio. The #3A3A3A text on pastels easily passes.
accessibility_and_testing.testing: All interactive elements MUST have data-testid attributes (e.g., data-testid='save-planner-button', data-testid='todo-checkbox-1').

image_urls.description: Media URLs to be used for backgrounds, textures, or empty states. Do not use placeholder images.

instructions_to_main_agent: Do NOT use 'Inter' font for anything. Use 'Caveat' for headings and 'Nunito' for body text. Update index.html to include the Google Fonts import URL.
Set up Tailwind config to extend colors with the provided hex codes and add 'caveat' and 'nunito' to font families.
Build the dashboard using a CSS grid or Masonry layout for the sticky note cards to mimic a messy desk/planner.

Avoid using Shadcn 'Card' components for the main sticky notes, as they have predefined styles that might conflict. Use raw divs with Tailwind classes like rounded-sm, shadow-md, and pastel background colors.
Ensure the 'Daily Schedules' card uses max-height and custom scrollbar so it doesn't break the layout.
Implement JWT-based custom auth, with users loading their specific day's data based on user_id and selected date.
Add decorative CSS elements like pseudo-elements for 'washi tape' or 'spiral bindings' to enhance the physical notebook feel.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
